# FD Portfolio

> Portfolio of Federico Contrino (FD), a student and technician focused on networking (CCNA), Linux system administration and cybersecurity. Showcases hands-on projects, labs and CTFs.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Federico Contrino's background, skills and projects in networking, Linux and cybersecurity.
- [About](/#about): Background and focus areas — networking, Linux system administration and security.
- [Skills](/#skills): Technical skills across C/C++, SQL, Arch Linux, Kali Linux, Ubuntu Server and Windows.
- [Projects](/#projects): Hands-on projects including the WPA2 Handshake Toolkit and CCNA labs.
- [Contact](/#contact): How to get in touch with Federico Contrino.
